title: Sounds Above the Canopy
synopsis: Blue, a small bottlenose dolphin calf, lives in a magical village of treehouses connected by rope bridges. When she starts hearing mysterious sounds that no one else can detect, she embarks on a three-day journey of discovery that leads to unexpected friendship and belonging.

pages.text: The rope bridge swayed under Blue's flippers. She stopped walking. A sound came from somewhere high above the leaves. Ting-a-ling-whistle-pop. Blue looked up. The other animals on the bridge kept walking. They chatted about mushroom soup and yesterday's rain. Blue's dark eyes searched the green canopy. Nothing there. But she heard it again. Ting-a-ling-whistle-pop.

illustration.description: A small bottlenose dolphin calf with pale silver-blue skin, a curving smile, bright dark eyes, and a single pale scar on her dorsal fin stands frozen on a swaying rope bridge, looking upward. Other cartoon animals (a rabbit, a fox, a squirrel) continue walking past her, chatting obliviously. Exaggerated cartoon style with oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic poses, and slapstick energy.
illustration.alt: Blue stops on the bridge to listen while other animals walk past

pages.text: Blue's neighbor Mrs. Rabbit hopped over. 'What are you doing, little dolphin?' Blue pointed her flipper up. 'Do you hear that sound?' Mrs. Rabbit twitched her ears. She listened hard. 'I don't hear anything special.' Blue frowned. The sound came again. Louder this time. Ting-a-ling-whistle-POP. Mrs. Rabbit shrugged. She hopped away toward the market treehouse.

illustration.description: A small bottlenose dolphin calf with pale silver-blue skin, a curving smile, bright dark eyes, and a single pale scar on her dorsal fin points upward while talking to a cartoon rabbit wearing a polka dot apron. The rabbit has exaggerated confused expression with tilted head. Colorful treehouses visible in background. Exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch animation, candy bright colors, and comedic poses.
illustration.alt: Blue points up while Mrs. Rabbit looks confused

pages.text: Blue spent the rest of the day listening. The sound happened seven more times. Always when she was alone. Always from above. At dinner in her cozy treehouse, she told Papa Otter about it. He stirred his kelp stew. 'Sounds carry strangely in the trees,' he said. 'Maybe it's just the wind.' But Blue knew wind sounds. This was different. This was music.

illustration.description: A small bottlenose dolphin calf with pale silver-blue skin, a curving smile, bright dark eyes, and a single pale scar on her dorsal fin sits at a wooden table in a cozy treehouse with a cartoon otter wearing suspenders. Steam rises from bowls of green stew. Warm yellow light glows through round windows. Exaggerated cartoon style with rubber hose animation feel and bouncy dynamic details.
illustration.alt: Blue eats dinner with Papa Otter in their treehouse

pages.text: The next morning, Blue woke to the sound. Ting-a-ling-whistle-pop-CRASH. She tumbled out of her leaf bed. That was new. The crash part. She rushed onto her balcony. The rope bridges were empty. The other treehouses were quiet. Everyone else was still sleeping. Blue looked up at the thick green leaves. 'Hello?' she called softly. Silence.

illustration.description: A small bottlenose dolphin calf with pale silver-blue skin, a curving smile, bright dark eyes, and a single pale scar on her dorsal fin tumbles comically out of a bed made of leaves, with exaggerated surprised expression and flippers flailing. Morning sunlight streams through a round window. Exaggerated cartoon style with slapstick energy and oversized expressions.
illustration.alt: Blue falls out of bed in surprise

pages.text: At breakfast, the sounds got worse. Ting-a-ling-whistle-pop-crash-BOOM. Blue dropped her seaweed toast. Papa Otter didn't even blink. 'Are you feeling alright, little dolphin?' he asked. Blue's fins were shaking. The sounds were getting louder. Getting closer. But Papa Otter heard nothing at all. Blue felt very alone.

illustration.description: A small bottlenose dolphin calf with pale silver-blue skin, a curving smile, bright dark eyes, and a single pale scar on her dorsal fin drops a piece of green toast, looking startled with wide eyes and trembling flippers. Papa Otter continues eating calmly with a content expression. Exaggerated cartoon style with comedic poses and bouncy dynamic energy.
illustration.alt: Blue drops her toast while Papa Otter eats calmly

pages.text: By afternoon, the sounds came every few minutes. Ting-a-ling-whistle-pop-crash-boom-CLATTER. Blue covered her ears with her flippers. She couldn't concentrate on anything. When Squirrel Sam asked her to play acorn catch, she shook her head. When the Badger twins invited her to their tea party, she swam home instead. The sounds followed her everywhere.

illustration.description: A small bottlenose dolphin calf with pale silver-blue skin, a curving smile, bright dark eyes, and a single pale scar on her dorsal fin covers her ears with her flippers, looking overwhelmed. Around her, cartoon animals (squirrels, badgers) look concerned and confused. Exaggerated cartoon style with oversized expressions showing distress, candy bright colors, and rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Blue covers her ears while worried friends surround her

pages.text: On the third morning, Blue made a decision. She would find the source of the sounds. No one else could hear them. So no one else could help her. She put on her climbing harness. Papa Otter used it for reaching high branches. Blue had never climbed above the treehouse level before. Today was different. Today she had to know.

illustration.description: A small bottlenose dolphin calf with pale silver-blue skin, a curving smile, bright dark eyes, and a single pale scar on her dorsal fin straps on a bright red climbing harness with determination in her expression. She stands at the base of a massive tree trunk, looking up with resolve. Exaggerated cartoon style with heroic pose and bouncy dynamic energy.
illustration.alt: Blue puts on a climbing harness with determined expression

pages.text: Blue climbed higher than any dolphin should climb. Her flippers found holds in the bark. The rope and pulleys helped lift her up. The sounds got clearer as she climbed. Ting-a-ling-whistle-pop-crash-boom-clatter-DING. She was close now. Very close. The leaves grew thicker. The air smelled like pine cones and mysteries.

illustration.description: A small bottlenose dolphin calf with pale silver-blue skin, a curving smile, bright dark eyes, and a single pale scar on her dorsal fin climbs up thick tree bark using ropes and pulleys, surrounded by dense green leaves. Her expression shows concentration and excitement. Exaggerated cartoon style with squash and stretch animation, showing the impossible feat with comedic energy.
illustration.alt: Blue climbs high into the tree canopy on ropes

pages.text: Blue pushed through the last curtain of leaves. She found herself on a hidden platform. There sat a tiny dragon, no bigger than a teacup. He had pots and pans and bells and whistles. He was cooking something that smelled like starlight. 'Oh!' said the dragon. 'Someone finally heard my kitchen sounds!' Blue smiled her curving smile. 'I thought I was the only one,' they both said together.

illustration.description: A small bottlenose dolphin calf with pale silver-blue skin, a curving smile, bright dark eyes, and a single pale scar on her dorsal fin emerges through green leaves onto a secret wooden platform. A tiny cartoon dragon with iridescent scales sits surrounded by miniature pots, pans, bells, and whistles, looking delighted. Both characters have expressions of joy and surprise. Exaggerated cartoon style with candy bright colors and magical sparkles.
illustration.alt: Blue discovers a tiny dragon cooking on a secret platform

pages.text: The tiny dragon's name was Ping. He had been cooking alone in the canopy for months. His kitchen sounds were actually recipes. Each ting and whistle meant something delicious. Blue and Ping spent the afternoon cooking together. Papa Otter found them there at sunset. He climbed up to see what all the wonderful smells were about. 'Well,' he said, 'this explains everything.'

illustration.description: A small bottlenose dolphin calf with pale silver-blue skin, a curving smile, bright dark eyes, and a single pale scar on her dorsal fin cooks alongside a tiny dragon while Papa Otter emerges through the leaves with a surprised but pleased expression. Steam and magical sparkles rise from tiny pots. The platform is now cozy and welcoming. Exaggerated cartoon style with warm colors, bouncy poses, and rubber hose animation feel.
illustration.alt: Blue, Ping, and Papa Otter share the cooking platform at sunset

metadata.moralLesson: Sometimes being different means you can discover wonderful things others miss.

coverPrompt.description: A small bottlenose dolphin calf with pale silver-blue skin, a curving smile, bright dark eyes, and a single pale scar on her dorsal fin stands on a rope bridge between colorful treehouses. The dolphin looks up with wonder at the leafy canopy above. Exaggerated cartoon style with candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic poses, and a whimsical rubber hose animation feel.
coverPrompt.alt: Blue the dolphin calf on a rope bridge in a treehouse village

questions.question: What sound does Blue hear that others cannot?
questions.explanation: Blue hears the special sound 'Ting-a-ling-whistle-pop' coming from above the trees.

questions.question: Where does Blue live?
questions.explanation: Blue lives in a magical village of treehouses connected by rope bridges.

questions.question: Who does Blue find making the sounds?
questions.explanation: Blue discovers Ping, a tiny dragon who was cooking alone in the canopy.

questions.question: What was Ping actually doing when he made the sounds?
questions.explanation: Ping was cooking, and his kitchen sounds were actually part of his recipes.

questions.question: How does Blue get up to find the source of the sounds?
questions.explanation: Blue puts on Papa Otter's climbing harness and climbs up into the canopy by herself.
